sentence: Hoje não faz sol nem calor.
ipa: ˈɔʒe ˈnɐ̃w̃ ˈfas ˈsɔɫ ˈnẽj̃ kɐˈlor
gloss_en: Today it is neither sunny nor hot.
notes: Spelling-closer vocalism: 'hoje' -> [ˈɔʒe] with no EP [ɨ]-reduction, matching the Lusophone-African pattern in undolo2014; velarised coda [ɫ] in 'sol' inherited per lang2009. Word-final 'faz' still surfaces as EP [ʃ], the residual chiado the skeleton spec has not yet lowered to the CV alveolar coda.

sentence: O bilhete custa doze euros e meio.
ipa: o biˈʎete ˈkustɐ ˈdɔze ˈewrus i ˈmeju
gloss_en: The ticket costs twelve euros fifty.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'bilhete' and the 'euros e' vowel liaison per lang2009; final unstressed vowels stay [e]/[u] rather than EP [ɨ] per undolo2014.

sentence: Tenho consulta na quinta-feira às nove horas.
ipa: ˈteɲu kõˈsuɫtɐ nɐ ˈkĩtɐ ˈfejrɐ as ˈnɔve ˈɔrɐs
gloss_en: I have an appointment on Thursday at nine.
notes: Coda /s/ kept alveolar [s] in 'às' and 'horas' (no chiado) and palatal [ɲ] in 'tenho' per lang2009.

sentence: A minha família mora numa casa antiga.
ipa: ɐ ˈmiɲɐ fɐˈmiliɐ ˈmɔrɐ ˈnumɐ ˈkazɐ ɐ̃ˈtiɡɐ
gloss_en: My family lives in an old house.
notes: Palatal [ɲ] in 'minha' and intervocalic plosive [b d g] retained; 'casa antiga' liaison per lang2009, spelling-closer vowels per undolo2014.

sentence: Vira à direita e segue sempre em frente.
ipa: ˈvirɐ a diˈrejtɐ i ˈseɡe ˈsẽpre ẽj̃ ˈfrẽte
gloss_en: Turn right and keep going straight ahead.
notes: Retained 'ei' diphthong in 'direita' and nasal [ẽ] in 'sempre em' per lang2009.

sentence: Este bacalhau está muito salgado.
ipa: ˈeste bɐkɐˈʎaw eˈsta ˈmujtu sɐˈɫɡadu
gloss_en: This cod is very salty.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'bacalhau' and velarised coda [ɫ] in 'salgado' per lang2009.

sentence: Onde fica a estação de comboios?
ipa: ˈõde ˈfikɐ ɐ estɐˈsɐ̃w̃ de kõˈbojus
gloss_en: Where is the train station?
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'estação' and alveolar coda [s] in 'comboios' per lang2009.

sentence: Quantos quilos de pão queres?
ipa: ˈkwɐ̃tus ˈkilus de ˈpɐ̃w̃ ˈkeres
gloss_en: How many kilos of bread do you want?
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'pão' and alveolar coda [s] in 'quilos' per lang2009.

sentence: Se chovesse, ficávamos em casa.
ipa: se ʃuˈves̺e fiˈkavɐmus ẽj̃ ˈkazɐ
gloss_en: If it rained, we would stay home.
notes: Open mid [ɛ] in 'chovesse' and reduced final [ɐ] in 'casa' per undolo2014.

sentence: Ontem comprei peixe fresco no mercado.
ipa: ˈõtẽj̃ kõˈprej ˈpejʃe ˈfresku nu meˈrkadu
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought fresh fish at the market.
notes: Retained 'ei' diphthong in 'comprei'/'peixe' and alveolar tap [ɾ] in 'mercado' per lang2009.

sentence: Para o ano vou viajar até ao Porto.
ipa: ˈparɐ o ˈɐnu ˈvo viɐˈʒar ɐˈtɛ ɐu ˈportu
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Porto.
notes: 'até ao' vowel liaison and monophthongal 'vou' [o]; spelling-closer unstressed vowels per undolo2014.

sentence: Liga-me mais tarde, por favor.
ipa: ˈliɡɐ me ˈmajs ˈtarde pur fɐˈvɔr
gloss_en: Call me later, please.
notes: Alveolar coda [s] in 'mais' and alveolar rhotic in 'tarde'/'favor' per lang2009.

sentence: Olá, tudo bem contigo?
ipa: oˈla ˈtudu ˈbẽj̃ kõˈtiɡu
gloss_en: Hi, are you doing well?
notes: Nasal [ẽ] in 'bem' and close-mid vowels in 'contigo' per lang2009.

sentence: Quem não arrisca, não petisca.
ipa: ˈkẽj̃ ˈnɐ̃w̃ ɐˈriskɐ ˈnɐ̃w̃ peˈtiskɐ
gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
notes: Alveolar trill [r] from 'rr' in 'arrisca' — the CV rhotic is alveolar, not the EP uvular — per lang2009.

sentence: O carro corre depressa na estrada molhada.
ipa: o ˈkaru ˈkɔre deˈpres̺ɐ nɐ eˈstradɐ muˈʎadɐ
gloss_en: The car speeds down the wet road.
notes: Alveolar trill/tap in 'carro'/'corre'/'estrada' and 'na estrada' liaison per lang2009.

sentence: O melhor vinho branco vem do Douro.
ipa: o meˈʎɔr ˈviɲu ˈbrɐ̃ku ˈvẽj̃ du ˈdoru
gloss_en: The best white wine comes from the Douro.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'melhor', palatal [ɲ] in 'vinho' and the 'ou' diphthong in 'Douro' per lang2009.

sentence: A velha ponte de pedra ainda aguenta.
ipa: ɐ ˈveʎɐ ˈpõte de ˈpedrɐ ˈaj̃dɐ ɐˈɡẽtɐ
gloss_en: The old stone bridge still holds.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'velha', nasal [õ] in 'ponte' and open mid [ɛ] in 'pedra' per lang2009.

sentence: Nunca vi um céu tão azul.
ipa: ˈnũkɐ ˈvi ˈũ ˈsɛw ˈtɐ̃w̃ ɐˈzuɫ
gloss_en: I never saw such a blue sky.
notes: Open mid [ɛ] in 'céu', nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'tão' and velarised coda [ɫ] in 'azul' per lang2009.

sentence: O sol pôs-se atrás da montanha.
ipa: o ˈsɔɫ ˈpos se ɐˈtras dɐ mõˈtaɲɐ
gloss_en: The sun set behind the mountain.
notes: Velarised coda [ɫ] in 'sol' and palatal [ɲ] in 'montanha' per lang2009.

sentence: Ele trouxe rosas roxas do jardim.
ipa: ˈele ˈtrose ˈrɔzɐs ˈrɔʃɐs du ʒɐˈrdĩ
gloss_en: He brought red roses from the garden.
notes: Word-initial 'rosas'/'roxas' surface with the residual EP uvular [ʁ] rather than the CV alveolar rhotic (skeleton-spec limit); nasal [ĩ] in 'jardim' per lang2009.
